title: PhD Candidate - Synthetic Data and AI for Energy Systems

summary.lv: Transporta un sakaru institūts meklē PhD kandidātu 3 gadu pētniecības projektā 'Data Quality for Responsible AI in Energy Systems' (DARES).
summary.en: Transport and Telecommunications Institute is hiring a PhD candidate for the 3-year research project 'Data Quality for Responsible AI in Energy Systems' (DARES).
